# Onboarding preparation (CSM / PM)
The steps below **needed** to be starting a Cloud Control onboarding on behalf of a customer. The onboarding can not be start without these actions/information!

### Environment information
- [ ] Global Administrator (GA) credentials are present in PasswordState. (If multiple tenants, multiple GA accounts are needed)
- [ ] Ensure that the customer has assigned (Owner) access to the given credentials
- [ ] Add sub-issue for every subscription that need to be onboarded, with the following naming: `<customer> / <subscriptionid> / <tenantid>`

### Project management

- [ ] Project code available in Exact Online `<please put exact code here>`

### Reassure / Intercept portal
- [ ] Customer exists in Reassure
- [ ] Engineer who will do the onboarding is added as user and has permissions to onboarding the customer in Reassure
- [ ] The correct team is added in Reassure
- [ ] [Link Topdesk in Reassure](https://github.com/InterceptBV/RULES-OF-ENGAGEMENT/wiki/Onboarding-customer-in-Cloud-Control)
- [ ] Link SLA contract in [TOPdesk](https://github.com/InterceptBV/RULES-OF-ENGAGEMENT/wiki/TOPdesk-How-to-create-and-link-SLA-Contract)

> [!WARNING]
> The onboarding can not be start without these actions/information above!

# Onboarding (Engineer)

> [!IMPORTANT]
> Try onboarding dev/text subscription/tenants at first

- Log into [Intercept Customer portal](https://portal.intercept.cloud/) and switch to customer context
- Onboard every mentioned subscription with correct GA account.
- Follow the procedure in the [📖 RoE](https://github.com/InterceptBV/RULES-OF-ENGAGEMENT/wiki/Onboarding-customer-in-Cloud-Control)

If questions are error occurs, please reach out to platform team.
[📖 Onboarding WIKI](https://github.com/InterceptBV/ms-onboardingv2/wiki/Details)
